research_topics: Regime detection (NHMM, geometric observables, soft regime assignments)
Gold/silver ratio and metals prediction models
IC-based dynamic weighting with Spearman rank IC

findings.finding: Foundational online learning: weight_i = exp(-eta * cumulative_loss). Sublinear regret, no stationarity assumptions.
findings.relevance_to_us: Much simpler than PPO. Convert existing 70/30 blend to exp-decay. Would auto-downweight econ_calendar 55%->33% within 1-2 weeks.

findings.finding: Arxiv 2509.01393: PPO reweights 50 LLM alpha signals. Higher Sharpe, smaller drawdowns.
findings.relevance_to_us: Directly addresses degraded signal problem but requires training infrastructure.

findings.finding: Beta posterior per signal, updated by hit/miss. Probabilistic exploration/exploitation.
findings.relevance_to_us: Could replace accuracy gate cascade with cleaner probabilistic logic.

findings.finding: Sigmoid smoothing around regime thresholds eliminates hard flip-flopping.
findings.relevance_to_us: ADX/BOCPD near coin-flip partly due to hard thresholds. Soft assignments reduce whiplash.

findings.finding: 3 states (bull/bear/consolidation) outperform 2-state for BTC. Consolidation = where BUY signals fail.
findings.relevance_to_us: Our BUY bias failure is specifically during consolidation. 3-state model provides missing label.

findings.finding: Berry Phase Rate achieves Cohen d=0.72 with 67% fewer false alarms than Random Forest.
findings.relevance_to_us: Fundamentally different from our regime signals. Largely uncorrelated = captures distinct risk factors.

findings.finding: TauricResearch v0.2.5, 60K+ GitHub stars. Bull/bear/risk debate. Supports Claude.
findings.relevance_to_us: L2 could use structured debate instead of monolithic analysis. Start with prompt engineering.

findings.finding: Sharpe 0.99->1.54, max drawdown -30.8% to -13.8% in backtests.
findings.relevance_to_us: BTC vol ~60% vs XAU ~15%. Vol-targeting gives consistent risk per instrument.

findings.finding: 2026 best practice: ADX filters modify ATR multiplier — 1.0x range, 2.0x trending.
findings.relevance_to_us: Static stops get hit too often in ranging. Regime-conditional improves.

recommended_improvements.title: Exponential-decay signal weighting
recommended_improvements.rationale: Auto-downweight degraded signals. Sublinear regret. Minimal code change.

recommended_improvements.title: Soft regime assignments (sigmoid thresholds)
recommended_improvements.rationale: Eliminates hard regime flip-flopping. ADX/BOCPD coin-flip partly from hard boundaries.

recommended_improvements.title: Rolling Spearman IC recomputation (14d window, daily)
recommended_improvements.rationale: IC is leading indicator of accuracy decay. Catches degradation 1-2 weeks earlier.

recommended_improvements.title: Regime-conditional ATR stop multipliers
recommended_improvements.rationale: Static stops fail in ranging markets. Uses existing regime output.

recommended_improvements.title: Inverse-volatility position sizing
recommended_improvements.rationale: Consistent risk per instrument. BTC 4x more volatile than XAU.
